--- Main Page ---
Jelly Roll's Goodnight Nashville | Rooftop Bar & Live Music Venue
Skip to Content
Goodnight Nashville
Welcome to Goodnight Nashville, Jelly Roll’s love letter to his hometown and the lively music scene. Nestled right on Broadway, our rustic, tattoo-themed bar spans four floors and features the highest rooftop in Music City. Dive into Nashville’s vibe with live music, tasty bites, and jaw-dropping skyline views from up top. No matter if you’re here to soak in the atmosphere or celebrate an event, Goodnight Nashville offers an unforgettable experience celebrating the best of Music City.

--- Page: /brunch ---
Brunch at Goodnight Nashville | Rooftop Vibes & Bites
Skip to Content
Brunch
Brunch at Goodnight Nashville hits just right—laid-back, a little rowdy, and exactly what your weekend needed.
Every Saturday & Sunday until 2PM,
we’re serving up Southern comfort with a twist: think chicken & waffles, loaded bloody mary’s, and all the fixins that don’t miss. Whether you’re rolling in for hair of the dog or kicking off a full-send weekend, our DJs keep the energy high while you dig into brunch classics done our way. Bring the crew, grab a mimosa tower, and stay a while—at Goodnight Nashville, brunch is always a damn good time.
No reservations, no problem — we’re walk-in only!

meta.meta_description: Goodnight Nashville is Broadway’s rooftop bar destination - skyline views, cocktails, and live music in the heart of Music City.
